text: - 4.8 ELECTRONIC SUBMITALS: Subcontractor will provide electronic submittals of all required shop drawings and submittals in accordance with the Subcontract Documents or as directed by Contractor. All submittals are to be submitted in their entirety within a mutually agreeable time frame of receiving the Subcontract. This includes all shop drawings and product data. All incomplete submittals will be returned to Subcontractor for completion and resubmission.
